hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【AI】新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境；【FINANCE】“政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储；【WORLD】美国警告苏丹奥贝德“迫在眉睫”的暴行。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.summary: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.summary_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title: U.S. Warns of ‘Imminent’ Atrocities in El Obeid, Sudan
items.summary: A highway running through El Obeid links Darfur in west Sudan to the east, making it a strategically significant battleground.
items.title_zh: 美国警告苏丹奥贝德“迫在眉睫”的暴行
items.summary_zh: 一条穿过埃尔奥贝德的高速公路将苏丹西部的达尔富尔与东部连接起来，使其成为具有重要战略意义的战场。

items.title: Congress sends anti-CBDC housing bill to Trump’s desk for final approval
items.summary: The bill, which seeks to boost housing affordability in America, also includes language banning CBDC until Dec. 31, 2030.
items.title_zh: 国会将反 CBDC 住房法案送交特朗普办公桌等待最终批准
items.summary_zh: 该法案旨在提高美国的住房负担能力，其中还包括在 2030 年 12 月 31 日之前禁止使用 CBDC。

items.title: The Runes revival: Bitcoin traffic hits a two-year high as transactions blast past 820,000
items.summary: A surge in Rune protocol activity is pushing Bitcoin transaction counts and fee generation to multi year highs.
items.title_zh: 符文复兴：比特币流量创两年新高，交易量突破 82 万笔
items.summary_zh: Rune 协议活动的激增正在将比特币交易数量和费用产生推至多年来的新高。

items.title: Michael Saylor should halt Strategy's bitcoin buys, says CryptoQuant
items.summary: CryptoQuant says the cash cushion behind Strategy's STRC has thinned from seven years of coverage to 14 months, and buying BTC at cycle tops has left the company with a $10.6 billion paper loss.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示 Michael Saylor 应该停止 Strategy 的比特币购买
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，Strategy 的 STRC 背后的现金缓冲已从 7 年期限缩短至 14 个月，在周期顶部购买 BTC 使该公司蒙受了 106 亿美元的账面损失。

items.title: 21Shares says bitcoin’s post-halving price action ‘still looks familiar,’ but sees recovery toward $100,000 by year-end
items.summary: Bitcoin sits roughly 50% below its $126,000 peak in October 2025 as 21Shares points to a $100,000 base-case recovery by year-end.
items.title_zh: 21Shares 表示，比特币减半后的价格走势“看起来仍然很熟悉”，但预计到年底将回升至 10 万美元
items.summary_zh: 比特币价格较 2025 年 10 月的峰值 126,000 美元低约 50%，21Shares 预计到年底将恢复 100,000 美元的基本情况。

items.title: SBI Group launches Japan’s first trust bank-backed stablecoin JPYSC
items.summary: JPYSC's availability will be limited to SBI VC Trade accounts, until regulatory and tax treatment of the stablecoin is clarified.
items.title_zh: SBI 集团推出日本首个由信托银行支持的稳定币 JPYSC
items.summary_zh: 在稳定币的监管和税务处理明确之前，JPYSC 的可用性将仅限于 SBI VC Trade 账户。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.title_zh: GPT-5 如何帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解开三年之久的谜团
items.summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro 帮助解决了一个长达 3 年的免疫学谜团，提供了对 T 细胞行为的见解。这一突破可以支持癌症和自身免疫研究。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: CFTC sues Kentucky over actions against prediction markets, making it first red state to face federal scrutiny
items.summary: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.
items.title_zh: CFTC 就针对预测市场的行为起诉肯塔基州，使其成为第一个面临联邦审查的红州
items.summary_zh: 该委员会现已起诉九个州，以捍卫其所认为的监管赛事合同的专有权利。

items.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
items.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
items.title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.summary_zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

items.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
items.summary: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.
items.title_zh: 国会首次通过战争权力措施，在伊朗问题上与特朗普决裂
items.summary_zh: 周二通过的决议在很大程度上是象征性的，但它增加了白宫一劳永逸结束冲突的压力。

items.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
items.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥警告不要过路费 联合国表示将疏散滞留在霍尔木兹海峡的水手
items.summary_zh: 美国国务卿卢比奥警告伊朗，任何国家都不能向通过该海峡的船只收取费用。

items.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
items.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼支持的候选人在纽约民主党初选中大获全胜
items.summary_zh: 布拉德·兰德 (Brad Lander) 在一场竞选中击败丹·戈德曼 (Dan Goldman)，暴露了该市在以色列-加沙战争问题上的分歧。

items.title: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
items.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰空袭后克里米亚最大城市断电
items.summary_zh: 塞瓦斯托波尔在莫斯科任命的州长警告说，一些地区直到晚上才会停电。

items.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
items.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.
items.title_zh: 联合国核负责人表示，作为战争协议的一部分，视察员将访问伊朗场地
items.summary_zh: 拉斐尔·格罗西表示，国际原子能机构正在“研究具体方式”，但伊朗部长表示，这种准入只是与美国达成的最终协议的一部分。

items.title: French woman allegedly held captive by husband for 12 years rescued in Pakistan
items.summary: Yasmina alleges she was held along with her five children, and they were all cut off from the outside world.
items.title_zh: 法国女子据称被丈夫囚禁12年在巴基斯坦获救
items.summary_zh: 亚斯米娜声称，她和五个孩子一起被关押，他们都与外界隔绝。

items.title: Sydney woman wakes from induced coma more than a week after shark attack
items.summary: Leah Stewart, 34, had one of her arms amputated after she was bitten while swimming at Coogee Beach.
items.title_zh: 悉尼女子遭鲨鱼袭击一周多后从昏迷中醒来
items.summary_zh: 34 岁的利亚·斯图尔特 (Leah Stewart) 在库吉海滩游泳时被咬伤，一只手臂被截肢。

items.title: How Mark Rutte of NATO Manages an Unpredictable Trump
items.summary: Secretary General Mark Rutte is headed to Washington. His style has at times frustrated the very European leaders who need him to hold the alliance together.
items.title_zh: 北约的马克·鲁特如何应对不可预测的特朗普
items.summary_zh: 秘书长马克·吕特将前往华盛顿。他的风格有时会让那些需要他来维持联盟的欧洲领导人感到沮丧。

items.title: After Wars and False Starts, Cautious Optimism for U.S.-Iran Talks
items.summary: Tehran and Washington face myriad negotiating pitfalls. But both sides are exhausted and running out of options. They may finally need a deal.
items.title_zh: 战争和失败的开始之后，对美伊谈判持谨慎乐观态度
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰和华盛顿面临着无数的谈判陷阱。但双方都已精疲力竭，别无选择。他们可能最终需要达成协议。

items.title: YZi Labs ends proxy war with BNB treasury company CEA Industries
items.summary: Partner Alex Odagiu will serve as an interim president, pending a search for a new chief executive, while head of YZi Labs Ella Zhang and Matthew Roszak also appointed directors of CEA.
items.title_zh: YZi Labs 结束与 BNB 财务公司 CEA Industries 的代理权战争
items.summary_zh: 合伙人 Alex Odagiu 将担任临时总裁，等待寻找新的首席执行官，而 YZi Labs 负责人 Ella Zhang 和 Matthew Roszak 也被任命为 CEA 董事。

items.title: Law enforcement groups warn Clarity Act could hinder crypto crime investigations
items.summary: A provision in the Clarity Act could make it harder for law enforcement to investigate illicit crypto activity, the groups said.
items.title_zh: 执法团体警告《澄清法案》可能会阻碍加密货币犯罪调查
items.summary_zh: 这些组织表示，《澄清法案》中的一项条款可能会让执法部门更难调查非法加密活动。

items.title: Mark Cuban, Dallas Mavericks face appeal over dismissed Voyager crypto case
items.summary: Voyager investors appealed the dismissal of their claims against Mark Cuban and the Dallas Mavericks to the Eleventh Circuit.
items.title_zh: 马克·库班 (Mark Cuban) 和达拉斯小牛队 (Dallas Mavericks) 因 Voyager 加密案件被驳回而面临上诉
items.summary_zh: Voyager 投资者针对马克·库班和达拉斯小牛队的索赔被驳回，向第十一巡回法院提出上诉。

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
items.title_zh: Omio 如何打造对话式旅行的未来
items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: Bitcoin clings to $62,500 as bears tighten grip on crypto market
items.summary: Bitcoin held above $62,500 and ether near $1,665, but sluggish price action and widening put skews signal bears remain firmly in control.
items.title_zh: 随着空头加强对加密货币市场的控制，比特币坚守 62,500 美元
items.summary_zh: 比特币维持在 62,500 美元上方，以太币维持在 1,665 美元附近，但价格走势疲软和看跌期权倾斜扩大表明空头仍牢牢掌控着局势。

items.title: Bitcoin OGs aren't selling as aggressively as they did above $100,000
items.summary: Bitcoin "OGs" have slashed their selling activity to the lowest levels in nearly two years.
items.title_zh: 比特币 OG 的抛售不像 10 万美元以上那样积极
items.summary_zh: 比特币“OG”已将其销售活动削减至近两年来的最低水平。

items.title: Cboe launches prediction market suite with binary option contracts on S&P 500
items.summary: The contracts are currently available on Interactive Brokers and are expected to launch on Charles Schwab in the coming months.
items.title_zh: Cboe 推出标普 500 指数二元期权合约预测市场套件
items.summary_zh: 这些合约目前可在盈透证券上购买，预计未来几个月将在嘉信理财上推出。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 引入了新的支出控制和使用分析，帮助组织充满信心地管理成本并扩展 AI。

items.title: We got local models to triage the OpenClaw repo for FREE!*
items.title_zh: 我们有本地模型免费对 OpenClaw 存储库进行分类！*

items.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
items.title_zh: 是否足够代理？在您自己的工具上对开放模型进行基准测试

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Wendy's stock soars as meme traders target another turnaround play
items.summary: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.
items.title_zh: 随着模因交易员瞄准另一场扭亏为盈，温迪的股价飙升
items.summary_zh: 虽然管理层变动会影响投资者的情绪，但变动的幅度表明可能还有其他因素在起作用。

items.title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
items.summary: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员预计，马姆达尼支持的候选人可能会在纽约市初选中获胜
items.summary_zh: 选民们即将前往纽约投票，民主党国会初选的四场激烈角逐成为焦点。

items.title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
items.summary: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 看到了卖空者的一些兴趣，但许多人仍然不敢做空马斯克
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 Partners 估计，约有 4000 万股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占公开交易股票的 5% 至 7%。

items.title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks fell in response
items.summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."
items.title_zh: Meta 正在构建一个预测市场应用程序。这些股票应声下跌
items.summary_zh: 报道称，首席执行官马克·扎克伯格指示员工开发一个预测市场平台，内部称为“Arena”。

items.title: U.S. fights with Brazil for China's giant soybean market
items.summary: The U.S. Soybean Export Council makes claims to higher quality a selling point over Brazil's crop, as American farmers attempt to win back business from the world's largest importer
items.title_zh: 美国与巴西争夺中国巨大大豆市场
items.summary_zh: 美国大豆出口委员会声称更高质量是巴西作物的卖点，因为美国农民试图从世界最大进口国手中夺回业务

items.title: China's 618 shopping festival growth slows sharply as consumer spending malaise persists
items.summary: The latest consumer data reinforce how consumption in China remains subdued.
items.title_zh: 消费者支出持续低迷，中国618购物节增速大幅放缓
items.summary_zh: 最新的消费者数据凸显了中国的消费依然低迷。

items.title: Can anyone join Musk in the trillionaire club? Zuckerberg has best shot, according to prediction markets
items.summary: The Meta CEO is seen as next to join the Tesla and SpaceX CEO. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is seen as the second-most-likely.
items.title_zh: 有人能加入马斯克的万亿富翁俱乐部吗？根据预测市场，扎克伯格是最好的选择
items.summary_zh: Meta 首席执行官被认为是继特斯拉和 SpaceX 首席执行官之后的下一位首席执行官。英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋被认为是第二个最有可能的人。

items.title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
items.summary: About 68,000 homes in Brittany have been affected, with electricity unlikely to be fully restored until Wednesday night.
items.title_zh: 创纪录的热浪达到顶峰，法国停电
items.summary_zh: 布列塔尼约 68,000 户家庭受到影响，电力在周三晚上之前不太可能完全恢复。

items.title: France confirms first Ebola case
items.summary: More than 260 people in the Democratic Republic of Congo are known to have died during the current outbreak.
items.title_zh: 法国确认首例埃博拉病例
items.summary_zh: 据了解，刚果民主共和国已有 260 多人在此次疫情中死亡。

items.title: Eight sentenced to 450 years in prison over anti-ICE riot where officer was shot
items.summary: An officer was shot in the neck during the Texas disorder by "Antifa Cell operatives", prosecutors said.
items.title_zh: 八人因反 ICE 骚乱导致警员被枪杀而被判处 450 年监禁
items.summary_zh: 检察官称，在得克萨斯州骚乱期间，一名警官被“Antifa Cell”特工开枪射中颈部。

items.title: U.S. and Iran Offer Conflicting Accounts of Nuclear Discussions
items.summary: President Trump said Iran had agreed to the “highest level” inspections, hours after an Iranian official said there were “no detailed discussions on the nuclear issue,” as the two sides continued to present different narratives of their latest talks.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗对核讨论的说法相互矛盾
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，伊朗已同意进行“最高级别”的检查，几小时前，一名伊朗官员表示“没有就核问题进行详细讨论”，双方继续对最新会谈提出不同的说法。

items.title: ‘A Terrible Inheritance’: Could Andy Burnham Succeed Where Starmer Failed?
items.summary: The likely successor to Prime Minister Keir Starmer will inherit the same challenges of economic stagnation and ascendant populism. Will a divided nation be prepared to give him time?
items.title_zh: “可怕的继承”：安迪·伯纳姆能否在斯塔默失败的地方取得成功？
items.summary_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默的可能继任者将面临经济停滞和民粹主义抬头的同样挑战。一个分裂的国家愿意给他时间吗？

items.title: Iran Makes Moves to Assert Control Over the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: After Iran weaponized the waterway by making it too dangerous for businesses, experts say, the country is now looking to charge fees to vessels seeking to transit the vital water.
items.title_zh: 伊朗采取行动控制霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 专家表示，伊朗将这条水道武器化，使其对企业来说过于危险，现在该国正寻求向寻求运输重要水源的船只收取费用。

items.title: Delcy Rodríguez, Venezuela’s President, Struggles to Uphold Trump’s Narrative of Success
items.summary: President Trump says Venezuela, under U.S. oversight, has “never made the money” it is making now. But new oil revenue isn’t helping ordinary Venezuelans, and anger seems to be mounting.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉总统德尔西·罗德里格斯努力维护特朗普的成功叙事
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，在美国的监督下，委内瑞拉“从未赚到过现在赚到的钱”。但新的石油收入并没有帮助普通委内瑞拉人，人们的愤怒似乎正在加剧。

items.title: Britain Is Still Deep in the Shadow of Brexit
items.summary: Ten years after a slim majority voted to leave the European Union, the economic and political effects of that decision continue to disrupt the United Kingdom.
items.title_zh: 英国仍深陷脱欧阴影之中
items.summary_zh: 在以微弱多数投票决定离开欧盟十年后，这一决定的经济和政治影响继续扰乱着英国。

items.title: Those British Strawberries Are Being Picked by Central Asian Workers
items.summary: Ten years after Brexit, most seasonal workers in Britain are from countries such as Kyrgyzstan and Tajikistan. Without them, agricultural chiefs say, many farms would fail.
items.title_zh: 那些英国草莓正在被中亚工人采摘
items.summary_zh: 英国脱欧十年后，英国的大多数季节性工人来自吉尔吉斯斯坦和塔吉克斯坦等国家。农业负责人表示，如果没有它们，许多农场就会倒闭。

items.title: Soldier, Scholar and Symbol: Marc Bloch Is Elevated to France’s Panthéon
items.summary: French politicians, including those on the far right, are embracing a Jewish Resistance fighter murdered by the Gestapo in 1944.
items.title_zh: 士兵、学者和象征：马克·布洛赫 (Marc Bloch) 被晋升为法国先贤祠
items.summary_zh: 包括极右翼在内的法国政界人士正在拥抱 1944 年被盖世太保杀害的犹太抵抗运动战士。

items.title: CZ, Binance founder, wants to clear up 'misunderstandings' about who he is
items.summary: The former CEO of the world's largest crypto exchange is seeking to redefine himself to the world on his own terms.
items.title_zh: 币安创始人 CZ 希望澄清关于他是谁的“误解”
items.summary_zh: 全球最大加密货币交易所的前首席执行官正在寻求以自己的方式向世界重新定义自己。

items.title: Aave could soar to $3,500 by 2030 on DeFi revival, says StanChart
items.summary: Geoff Kendrick said Aave has moved past April's cyberattack-related market disruption and is well positioned to benefit from growth in tokenized assets and DeFi.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行表示，随着 DeFi 的复兴，到 2030 年，Aave 可能会飙升至 3,500 美元
items.summary_zh: Geoff Kendrick 表示，Aave 已经摆脱了 4 月份与网络攻击相关的市场混乱，并处于有利位置，可以从代币化资产和 DeFi 的增长中受益。

items.title: This forgotten coin could surprise everyone before its next halving

items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 24 日天气预报

items.title: Cboe revives S&P 500 binary options, chasing a market popularized by Polymarket, Kalshi
items.summary: One of the largest U.S. derivatives exchanges is bringing back yes/no bets on the S&P 500 after pulling them a decade ago, moving onto turf that Polymarket and Kalshi turned into one of the internet's fastest-growing corners.
items.title_zh: 芝加哥期权交易所 (Cboe) 重振标准普尔 500 指数二元期权，追逐由 Polymarket、Kalshi 所普及的市场
items.summary_zh: 美国最大的衍生品交易所之一在十年前取消了对标准普尔 500 指数的“是/否”押注后，又恢复了押注，转向 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 已成为互联网增长最快的角落之一的地盘。

items.title: Trump lands in Senate's crosshairs over $500 million UAE investment in his crypto venture
items.summary: Senate Democrats call for hearings into whether a $500 million investment by UAE officials in World Liberty Financial influenced Trump's policy decisions.

items.summary_zh: 参议院民主党人呼吁举行听证会，调查阿联酋官员对世界自由金融公司的 5 亿美元投资是否影响了特朗普的政策决定。

items.title: Black Lake, Nuva Labs tokenize $25 million in mortgage loans on Provenance in RWA push

items.summary_zh: Black Lake 和 Nuva Labs 在 Provenance 区块链上完成了 2500 万美元抵押贷款的链上铸造。

items.title: CEA Industries ends proxy fight with YZi Labs, adds Ella Zhang as board director

items.summary_zh: BNB财务公司CEA Industries已与YZi Labs达成合作协议，结束了长达数月的治理纠纷。

items.title: Crypto PAC-backed Adrian Boafo secures victory in Maryland Democratic primary

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
